_comment: MOODCHAT — Firebase Realtime Database rules (presence, typing, recording, call signaling).
_dev_mode: These rules allow open read/write so the Supabase-only client works immediately (DEV/DEMO).
_production_note: For production, sign in with a Firebase custom token and tighten each node, e.g. status/$uid '.write': 'auth != null && auth.uid == $uid'.
